title: Open-access ALS cohort analysis in motor neuron disease
abstract: Motor neuron degeneration markers were associated with faster ALS progression.
body_text: Results showed microglial activation correlated with reduced survival in the cohort.

title: Meta-analysis of neuroinflammation biomarkers in ALS
abstract: Pooled neuroinflammation biomarkers associated with disease progression.
body_text: Discussion highlights neuroinflammation as a consistent progression signal.

title: TDP-43 pathology and axonal transport defects in ALS models
abstract: TDP-43 pathology correlated with axonal transport impairment in preclinical models.
body_text: Axonal transport defects were observed alongside TDP-43 pathology in motor neurons.

title: Protein aggregation inhibitor improved motor outcomes in ALS mice
abstract: Treatment reduced protein aggregation and improved motor function.
body_text: Protein aggregation decreased and motor outcomes improved in treated mice.
